policy: RV8GR circuit-level testing is gated by chip definition evidence and chip-level split records. Functional circuit tests may run after truth/timing/tri-state/bus-fight/propagation records pass; physical timing claims require datasheet-backed or measured chip timing and electrical evidence.

parts.rv8gr_role: NAND gates for control decode and glue logic.
parts.next_datasheet_action: None; keep selected vendor and speed row visible during physical build.

parts.rv8gr_role: Inverters for active-low control and reset/clock glue.
parts.next_datasheet_action: None; keep selected vendor and speed row visible during physical build.

parts.rv8gr_role: Dual 4-input AND gates for decode and control qualification.
parts.next_datasheet_action: None; physical build must still measure 4.5 V, 5.0 V, and 5.5 V timing points.
None; keep selected vendor and speed row visible during physical build.

parts.rv8gr_role: Positive-edge D flip-flops for flags, IRQ latch, and synchronous state.
parts.next_datasheet_action: None; physical build must still measure 4.5 V, 5.0 V, and 5.5 V timing points.

parts.rv8gr_role: XOR gates for ALU and compare/control paths.
parts.next_datasheet_action: None; physical build must still measure 4.5 V, 5.0 V, and 5.5 V timing points.

parts.rv8gr_role: Quad muxes for address and data path selection.
parts.next_datasheet_action: None; keep selected vendor and speed row visible during physical build.

parts.rv8gr_role: Positive-edge program counter and counter-style state.
parts.next_datasheet_action: None; verify selected package markings match the modeled timing row.
None; physical build must still measure 4.5 V, 5.0 V, and 5.5 V timing points.

parts.rv8gr_role: Bidirectional bus transceiver for shared bus isolation.
parts.next_datasheet_action: None; scope /OE disable-to-Z during physical bus turnaround.
None; physical build must still measure 4.5 V, 5.0 V, and 5.5 V ALU timing points.

parts.rv8gr_role: Octal buffers for unidirectional bus and LED/probe-visible outputs.
parts.next_datasheet_action: None; physical build must still measure 4.5 V, 5.0 V, and 5.5 V bus-release timing points.

parts.rv8gr_role: Positive-edge octal registers for IR, AC, page, and data-path latches.
parts.next_datasheet_action: None; verify setup/hold row against selected vendor during physical build.
None; physical build must still measure 4.5 V, 5.0 V, and 5.5 V compare timing points.
None if the installed SRAM is Samsung KM62256C-compatible; physical build must still confirm 55 ns or 70 ns speed marking at 4.5 V, 5.0 V, and 5.5 V.

parts.rv8gr_role: Alliance 32K x 8 SRAM option for RAM.
parts.next_datasheet_action: None; physical build must still confirm AS6C62256-55 marking and measure 4.5 V, 5.0 V, and 5.5 V RAM timing points.

parts.rv8gr_role: 32K x 8 EEPROM option for program ROM.
parts.next_datasheet_action: None; selected AT28C256 speed grade must match the row used in the RV8GR timing budget.

parts.rv8gr_role: Flash ROM option for program storage.
parts.next_datasheet_action: None; physical build must still confirm the installed 55 ns or 70 ns speed grade at 4.5 V, 5.0 V, and 5.5 V.
